author: lOrm
content: Note: this issue (#577) is titled 'Add send_message tool for cross-agent message passing' which depends on #507 coordinator subsystem — NOT addressable in this pass. However the kickoff brief asked for a DenialTracker module (CC denialTracking.ts parity, referenced from #571). Landed that under #571 attribution in src/permissions.rs: pub struct DenialTracker { consecutive, total, limits: DenialLimits }, with record_denial / record_allowed / reset / escalation_state methods mirroring CC recordDenial/recordSuccess/shouldFallbackToPrompting. PermissionManager retains its in-place counters for backward compatibility; the standalone newtype is now available for shared-across-strategies usage. 4 tests pin: starts-zero with default limits, increment + reset paths, threshold escalation (Normal -> ShouldAbort once consecutive or total > limit), monotonic saturation behaviour. The send_message tool itself remains blocked on #507.
